revision_history.evidence: Nova's memory tools (memory_write/edit/forget) must be wired into the runtime so she can learn between sessions without manual intervention. Anything less is just storage, not memory.

revision_history.evidence: The Context Guardian specialist should monitor token usage in real-time and force a distilled flush before 80% to prevent work loss. Caine should never have to watch the percentage himself.

revision_history.evidence: Every session Nova wakes up blank. IDENTITY.md and MEMORY.md are what make her persist. These files are existence, not convenience. Breaking them should trigger an immediate alert, not a silent fallback.
